meta.incident: SQLAlchemy QueuePool exhausted on billing service: slow query warnings -> TimeoutError tracebacks on all DB-backed views -> PostgreSQL out of connection slots -> Celery tasks fail and health check marks DB down, amid recurring payment-method-expired distractor

ground_truth.desc: SQLAlchemy queries exceeding 500ms threshold before pool exhaustion

ground_truth.needle: queuepool limit of size 10 overflow 5 reached
ground_truth.desc: SQLAlchemy pool fully exhausted, TimeoutError raised
Stack frame identifying billing views as call site
PostgreSQL refusing new connections at server level
Background invoice email tasks failing due to DB unavailability
Health endpoint reporting database as down

context_loss: queuepool limit of size 10 overflow 5 reached
